root_text.an2.310-319:1.4: Rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime dve dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.
root_text.an2.310-319:2.1: “Rāgassa, bhikkhave, pariññāya … parikkhayāya … pahānāya … khayāya … vayāya … virāgāya … nirodhāya … cāgāya … paṭinissaggāya dve dhammā bhāvetabbā …pe…
root_text.an2.320-479:1.1: “Dosassa …pe… mohassa … kodhassa … upanāhassa … makkhassa … paḷāsassa … issāya … macchariyassa … māyāya … sāṭheyyassa … thambhassa … sārambhassa … mānassa … atimānassa … madassa … pamādassa … abhiññāya … pariññāya … parikkhayāya … pahānāya … khayāya … vayāya … virāgāya … nirodhāya … cāgāya … paṭinissaggāya dve dhammā bhāvetabbā.
root_text.an2.320-479:1.4: Pamādassa, bhikkhave, paṭinissaggāya ime dve dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.
root_text.an2.320-479:2.2: Attamanā te bhikkhū bhagavato bhāsitaṁ abhinandunti.

translation_text.an2.310-319:0.2: The Chapter of Abbreviated Texts Beginning with Greed
translation_text.an2.310-319:1.1: “For insight into greed, two things should be developed.
translation_text.an2.310-319:1.4: For insight into greed, these two things should be developed.”
translation_text.an2.310-319:2.1: “For the complete understanding … finishing … giving up … ending … vanishing … fading away … cessation … giving away … letting go of greed, two things should be developed.”
translation_text.an2.320-479:1.1: “Of hate … delusion … anger … acrimony … disdain … contempt … jealousy … stinginess … deceit … deviousness … obstinacy … aggression … conceit … arrogance … vanity … negligence … for insight … complete understanding … finishing … giving up … ending … vanishing … fading away … cessation … giving away … letting go … two things should be developed.
translation_text.an2.320-479:1.4: For the letting go of negligence, these two things should be developed.”
translation_text.an2.320-479:2.1: That is what the Buddha said.
translation_text.an2.320-479:2.2: Satisfied, the mendicants approved what the Buddha said.
translation_text.an2.320-479:2.4: The Book of the Twos is finished.

variant_text.an2.320-479:2.1: Idamavoca bhagavā … → etthantare pāṭho si, sya-all, km, pts1ed potthakesu natthi
